subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-05
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcomed. I am always glad to meet you and associate with you. But the weather of Paris did not agree with me and caused me this illness.
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
